titles.en: Chapter on Saying the Name of Allah {swt} Before Intercourse
Chapter on Saying the Name of Allah {swt} Before Intercourse

segments: 4414 - قَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : "إِذَا أَتَى أَحَدُكُمْ أَهْلَهُ فَلْيَذْكُرِ اَللَّهَ فَإِنَّ مَنْ لَمْ يَذْكُرِ اَللَّهَ عِنْدَ اَلْجِمَاعِ وَ كَانَ مِنْهُ وَلَدٌ كَانَ ذَلِكَ شِرْكَ شَيْطَانٍ وَ يُعْرَفُ ذَلِكَ بِحُبِّنَا وَ بُغْضِنَا".
arabic.text: 4414 - قَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : "إِذَا أَتَى أَحَدُكُمْ أَهْلَهُ فَلْيَذْكُرِ اَللَّهَ فَإِنَّ مَنْ لَمْ يَذْكُرِ اَللَّهَ عِنْدَ اَلْجِمَاعِ وَ كَانَ مِنْهُ وَلَدٌ كَانَ ذَلِكَ شِرْكَ شَيْطَانٍ وَ يُعْرَفُ ذَلِكَ بِحُبِّنَا وَ بُغْضِنَا".

segments:
Hadith.4414 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as), said: "If one of you approaches his wife, let him remember Allah (swt), for whoever does not remember Allah (swt) during intercourse, and a child is born from it, that child will have a share of Satan's partnership.
This can be recognized by the child's love or hatred for us."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.4414 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as), said: "If one of you approaches his wife, let him remember Allah (swt), for whoever does not remember Allah (swt) during intercourse, and a child is born from it, that child will have a share of Satan's partnership.
This can be recognized by the child's love or hatred for us."
